info.description: API Server for THD iOS MDM Portal.
info.title: THD iOS MDM Portal API

get.description: Fetch tracked system alerts with support for pagination and filtering by severity, type, and status.

post.description: Manually create a new system alert.
Resolve multiple alerts in a single request.

parameters.description: List of alert IDs to resolve
parameters.name: request

get.description: Retrieve all alert rules with pagination and filtering by status.

post.description: Define a new alert rule with conditions and automated actions.

get.description: Fetch details of a specific alert rule by its system ID.

put.description: Update the configuration of an existing alert rule.

delete.description: Permanently remove an alert rule from the system.

put.description: Enable or disable an alert rule.

get.description: Get statistical data about alerts, such as counts by severity and status.
Retrieve details of a specific alert by its unique ID.

put.description: Mark an alert as acknowledged by an administrator.

post.description: Initiate a remote lock command for the device associated with this alert.

400.description: Invalid ID or device not found

post.description: Send a notification message to the device user associated with this alert.
Force push a specific configuration policy to the device associated with this alert.
Initiate a remote wipe (factory reset) command for the device associated with this alert.

400.description: Invalid ID or device not found

put.description: Mark an alert as resolved.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of tracked applications with filtering by platform and application type.

post.description: Add a new application tracking record to the system.
Initiate the remote installation of an application version on a target device or group.

get.description: Fetch detailed information for a single application including its version history.

put.description: Modify an existing application's metadata and tracking information.

delete.description: Permanently remove an application record from the tracking system.

get.description: Fetch version history for a specific application.

post.description: Register a new version/build of an existing application.

delete.description: Permanently remove a specific version of an application.

get.description: Retrieve a list of deployment records and their execution statuses for a specific version.

post.description: Authenticate user with username and password to receive JWT tokens.
Invalidate the current session and blacklists the token.

get.description: Returns the profile and permissions of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Refresh existing access token using a valid refresh token.

get.description: Get a summary of system alerts, categorized by severity (Critical, Warning, Info) and resolution status.
Fetch time-series or categorical data for dashboard charts (e.g., device enrollment trends, compliance rates).
Retrieve a breakdown of device statistics, including counts by OS platform (iOS, macOS, etc.) and enrollment status.
Fetch overall system statistics for the dashboard, including total devices, users, active alerts, and managed applications.
Get a paginated list of DEP profiles

post.description: Create a new DEP enrollment profile and register it with Apple DEP

get.description: Get the DEP profile currently set as the default for new enrollments
Retrieve a DEP profile by its ID

put.description: Update an existing DEP profile and sync with Apple DEP

delete.description: Delete a DEP profile from local database and Apple DEP

post.description: Assign this DEP profile to all active DEP devices currently stored in database
post.summary: Assign DEP profile to all existing devices

400.description: Invalid profile ID or profile not registered

post.description: Set a DEP profile as the default profile for new device enrollments

400.description: Invalid profile ID or profile not registered

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of device groups with support for name-based filtering and searching.

post.description: Create a new group to categorize and manage devices collectively.

get.description: Fetch detailed information for a single device group, including its assigned devices.

put.description: Modify the name and description of an existing device group.

delete.description: Permanently remove a device group. This does not delete the devices themselves, only the group.

post.description: Assign multiple devices to a group for collective management.

parameters.description: List of device IDs to add
parameters.name: request

delete.description: Remove a specific device from a group.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of managed devices with support for sorting and filtering by serial number, model, platform, and status.

parameters.description: Search in serial number, name, and model
parameters.name: search

get.description: Export all managed devices to a downloadable CSV or JSON file.

parameters.description: Export format (csv or json, default: csv)
parameters.name: format

get.description: Fetch detailed information for a single managed device using its unique system ID.

post.description: Enqueue an command to install a specific configuration profile onto an MDM-enrolled device.
Enqueue a remote lock command for an MDM-enrolled device. Optionally specify a PIN, message, and phone number to display on the lock screen.

400.description: Invalid request data or device ID

post.description: Enqueue a command to remove a configuration profile from an MDM-enrolled device using its identifier.
Enqueue an MDM command to query specific hardware and software attributes of an enrolled device.
Enqueue a remote restart command for an MDM-enrolled device.
Enqueue a remote shutdown command for an MDM-enrolled device.
Enqueue a remote wipe (factory reset) command for an MDM-enrolled device. This action is irreversible.

get.description: Verify that the MDM backend service is operational and reachable.
Get a paginated list of mobile configs with filtering and sorting

parameters.description: Search by name, payload_type, payload_display_name, payload_identifier
parameters.name: search

post.description: Create a new Apple mobileconfig with payloads and payload properties

put.description: Update an existing Apple mobileconfig with payloads and payload properties

delete.description: Delete an existing Apple mobileconfig by ID

get.description: Generate and return raw Apple mobileconfig XML content by ID
Retrieve a specific NanoCMD command plan definition by its name.

put.description: Store a command plan definition for automated command issuance.

get.description: Retrieve the details of an existing event subscription by its name.

put.description: Store an event subscription definition. Subsequent state changes will trigger callbacks based on this subscription.

get.description: Retrieve the Apple Configuration Profile template used for enabling FileVault encryption.
Retrieve cached inventory data for one or more MDM-enrolled devices.
Retrieve the raw XML content of a stored Apple Configuration Profile.

put.description: Store a raw Apple .mobileconfig XML file. Signed profiles are also supported.

delete.description: Permanently remove a stored Apple Configuration Profile definition.

get.description: Retrieve metadata for one or more stored configuration profiles.

parameters.description: Optional filter by list of profile names
parameters.name: name

get.description: Retrieve the current version of the running NanoCMD service.

post.description: Internal endpoint for NanoCMD to report command status changes and state updates. This consumes MicroMDM-compatible webhook payloads.
Initiate a pre-defined command workflow for one or more enrolled devices or user channels.

parameters.description: One or more Enrollment IDs (UDIDs or User Channel UUIDs)
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: Optional context data for the workflow
parameters.name: context

get.description: Retrieve a complete list of all Casbin authorization policies, defined as (role, path, method) tuples.

post.description: Create a new Casbin authorization rule.

delete.description: Permanently delete an existing Casbin authorization rule.

parameters.description: Policy rule details to identify the rule for removal
parameters.name: policy

get.description: Retrieve all Casbin authorization rules associated with a specific role name.

200.description: List of policies for the role

404.description: Role not found or has no policies

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of configuration profiles with support for filtering by name, platform, scope, and status.

post.description: Create a new configuration profile with initial settings and assignments.

get.description: Fetch detailed information for a single configuration profile including its settings and payloads.

put.description: Modify an existing configuration profile's settings and metadata.

delete.description: Permanently remove a configuration profile and its associated data.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all current assignments and deployment targets for this profile.

post.description: Assign a profile to a specific device or group for deployment.

delete.description: Remove an existing profile assignment from a device or group.

get.description: Fetch real-time deployment and installation status across all assigned devices.

post.description: Create an exact copy of an existing configuration profile for staging or modification.
Force a re-deployment of the profile to all assigned devices that haven't successfully installed it.

put.description: Modify automated compliance verification rules and enforcement actions for a profile.
Modify web content and domain access filters for a profile.
Modify network connectivity settings (Wi-Fi, VPN, Proxy) for a profile.
Modify hardware and software usage restrictions applied by this profile.
Modify the security-related platform configurations for a specific profile.
Update the operational status of a profile (active, draft, archived).

get.description: Retrieve the full version history and change logs for a specific configuration profile.

post.description: Revert a configuration profile to a previously saved version.

parameters.description: Target version ID to rollback to
parameters.name: versionId

get.description: Generate and download a CSV file containing all generated security and system alerts.

parameters.description: Filter alerts by description or severity
parameters.name: search

get.description: Generate and download a CSV file containing all tracked applications and their basic metadata.

parameters.description: Filter by bundle ID or application name
parameters.name: search

get.description: Generate and download a CSV file containing the current inventory of enrolled devices, with optional search filtering.

parameters.description: Filter by device name, serial number, or model
parameters.name: search

get.description: Retrieve a list of all role hierarchy links, representing parent-child relationships in the authorization system.

post.description: Create a new parent-child relationship between two roles in the hierarchy.

delete.description: Permanently delete an existing parent-child relationship between two roles.

parameters.description: Role link definition to identify the relationship for removal
parameters.name: role

get.description: Retrieve a complete list of all system-wide configuration settings (key-value pairs).

post.description: Register a new system-wide configuration setting.
Send SIGHUP to the DEP syncer container to reload its configuration. Useful after updating DEP tokens or configurations.

get.description: Retrieve the value and metadata for a specific configuration setting using its unique key.

put.description: Modify the value or description of an existing configuration setting.

delete.description: Permanently remove a configuration setting from the system.

get.description: Get a paginated list of users with filtering and sorting capabilities.

parameters.description: Sort by field (e.g., id, username, created_at)
parameters.name: sort

post.description: Register a new user with specified role and credentials.

400.description: Invalid request data or validation error

get.description: Fetch detailed information for a single user by their system ID.

put.description: Modify an existing user's profile, including email, role, and status.

delete.description: Remove a user from the system permanently (or mark as deleted).

get.description: Get the full detail of a mobile config by its ID

delete.description: Delete all payload property definitions from database

post.description: Upload a folder or zip file containing Apple Device Management YAML files. Supports multipart fields: folder, folder[], files, files[], file.
post.summary: Import payload property definitions from YAML folder

parameters.description: Folder zip file or files uploaded from folder picker
parameters.name: folder

get.description: Get all distinct payload types from payload property definitions
Returns payload properties as nested JSON tree. If payload_type query param is provided, only that type is returned. Otherwise all payload types are returned.
get.summary: Get nested schema for one or all payload types

parameters.description: Filter by payload type (e.g. com.apple.carddav.account). Omit to get all.
parameters.name: payload_type

get.description: Get all variants of a payload type with property count
get.summary: List payload variants by payload type

profile_data.description: ProfileData remains for any additional fields not explicitly mapped

udid.description: UDID is the Apple MDM enrollment identifier. Empty for DEP devices not yet enrolled.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and your JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: Client-facing APIs for device management actions (lock, wipe, restart, etc.)
tags.name: Device Actions

tags.description: Client-facing APIs for device listing and information
tags.name: Devices

tags.description: Client-facing APIs for configuration profile management
tags.name: Profiles

tags.description: Client-facing APIs for device group management
tags.name: Device Groups

tags.description: Client-facing APIs for dashboard statistics and charts
tags.name: Dashboard

tags.description: Admin APIs for MDM server configuration (requires admin role)
tags.name: MDM Setup

tags.description: Admin APIs for DEP/ABM configuration (requires admin role)
tags.name: DEP Setup

tags.description: Admin APIs for NanoCMD workflow configuration (requires admin role)
tags.name: NanoCMD Setup

tags.description: Admin APIs for system settings, users, and policies
tags.name: System
